scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run dev -w @khan-ludo/api" "npm run dev -w @khan-ludo/web"
scripts.local:light: npm run build && concurrently -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm run start -w @khan-ludo/api" "npm run preview -w @khan-ludo/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @khan-ludo/api && npm run build -w @khan-ludo/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @khan-ludo/api && npm run typecheck -w @khan-ludo/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @khan-ludo/api && npm run test -w @khan-ludo/web
